epreuves.mini_cours:
--- GRAMMAR & VOCABULARY CRITICAL RULES (IUSO ANGLAIS 2025) ---

1. GERUNDS AND INFINITIVES :
- The construction 'be used to' (être habitué à) is followed by a verb in the V-ing form. Example: « He is used to working under pressure. »
- 'Used to' + verb base expresses a past habit. Example: « I used to live in Port-Gentil. »
- The linker 'with a view to' (dans l'intention de) must be followed by a gerund (V-ing). Example: « They did research with a view to setting up a business. »
- Verbs of perception (see, hear, watch) are followed by a bare infinitive (verb without 'to') for a completed action, or V-ing for an ongoing action. Example: « I heard him say that. »

2. IF-CLAUSES AND CONDITIONAL STRUCTURES :
- Type 1 (Real Present/Future): If + Simple Present -> Will + Verb. Example: « If you study hard, you will pass. »
- Type 2 (Imaginary Present/Future): If + Simple Past -> Would + Verb. Example: « If I were you, I would study grammar. »
- Type 3 (Past Unfulfilled Action/Regret): If + Past Perfect (had + V-ed) -> Would have + Past Participle. Example: « If she had practiced, she would have succeeded. »

3. QUANTIFIERS AND DETERMINERS :
- Use 'too much' with uncountable nouns (work, time, information, milk).
- Use 'too many' with countable plural nouns (dossiers, students, offices).
- Use 'any' in negative sentences and questions, and 'some' in affirmative clauses.
- Use the article 'an' before words starting with a silent 'H' (an hour) and 'a' before words starting with a consonant sound, including /ju:/ (a university teacher).

4. PASSIVE VOICE, TIME CLAUSES AND QUESTION TAGS :
- Passive Voice: Subject + auxiliary 'be' (correctly conjugated) + Past Participle. Example: « The letter was written yesterday. »
- Future Time Clauses: Do NOT use 'will' after 'as soon as', 'when', 'until'. Use the Present Simple instead. Example: « As soon as he arrives, we will start. »
- Question tags with 'Let's...' always use 'shall we?'. Example: « Let's start the meeting, shall we? »

questions.texte: Bob is not used to ......... early in the morning for his classes.
If I ......... rich, I would invest in a communication company in Gabon.
She has been working at the administration department ......... five years.
We need to revise our lessons with a view to ......... the entrance exam.
As soon as the director ......... , the administrative committee will start the meeting.
The new administrative secretary has ......... work to complete before the weekend.
I didn't hear him ......... anything about the changes in the syllabus.
If she had studied harder, she ......... the admission selection last year.
The official report on digital communication ......... by the manager yesterday.
A friend of ......... told me about the administrative registration process.
He is actively looking for an internship in the tertiary ......... .
There isn't ......... sugar left in the teachers' lounge.
Let's review the main structures of business communication, ......... ?
The department boss ......... the workshop archives reorganized last month.
We have not received any official information ......... the transition started in 2023.
My father has been working as ......... university teacher at the IUSO.
If you ......... your lessons regularly, you will succeed in this entrance exam.
I will give you a phone call in ......... hour.
The head of the STT department ......... to Libreville last week.
Could you please give me ......... details about the administrative process?
This is a large company ......... products are exported all over Central Africa.
The general manager had his assistant ......... the official mail.
I have got very ......... time left before the end of the written test.
Bob used to ......... in Oyem before moving to Libreville for his studies.
Our English teacher wants us to stop ......... noise during the lesson.
Who is responsible ......... organizing the oral interviews for the candidates?
The ......... you start reviewing your exams, the ......... results you will get.
I am really looking forward to ......... my professional internship next month.
The candidate said that he ......... already prepared his professional project.
Unfortunately, several employees were ......... off due to the company's financial crisis.
